name: ts-node
description: Run the TypeScript interpreter for Node.JS

name: --help
-h
options.description: Show help for ts-node

name: -v
--version
options.description: Print version information of the ts-node module

name: -e
--eval
options.description: Evaluate script

name: -p
--print
options.description: Evaluate script and print result

name: -r
--require
options.description: Require module before executing

name: -i
--interactive
options.description: Always open interactive REPL

options.name: --show-config
options.description: Print resolved Typescript config to the terminal

options.name: --cwd-mode
options.description: Resolve Typescript config based on the current working directory

name: -T
--transpile-only
options.description: Use the Typescript transpile module mode

name: -H
--compiler-host
options.description: Use the Typescript compiler host API

name: -I
--ignore
options.description: Ignore patterns from Typescript compilation

name: -P
--project
options.description: Specify TypeScript project location

name: -C
--compiler
options.description: Use a custom compiler

options.name: --transpiler
options.description: Use a custom transpiler

name: -D
--ignore-diagnostics
options.description: Specify Typescript diagnostic code to ignore

name: -O
--compiler-options
options.description: JSON object that will be merged with the compiler options

options.name: --cwd
options.description: Specify working directory

options.name: --files
options.description: Load files, include and exclude from Typescript config on startup

options.name: --pretty
options.description: Use the pretty formatter for diagnostic errors

options.name: --skip-project
options.description: Skip reading Typescript config

options.name: --scope
options.description: Scope compilation to scope directory specified

options.name: --scope-dir
options.description: Directory for scope parameter

options.name: --skip-ignore
options.description: Skip --ignore checks

options.name: --prefer-ts-exts
options.description: Prefer Typescript files over JavaScript files when importing files

options.name: --log-error
options.description: Pipe Typescript errors to stderr instead of throwing exceptions

options.name: --no-experimental-repl-await
options.description: Disable the top-level await function in REPL
